object-cover object-top"}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-200 text-sm group-hover:text-orange-600 transition-colors","children":"Tom Hadley"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xs text-stone-400","children":"Ergonomics Specialist"}]]}]]}],["$","span",null,{"className":"flex items-center gap-1","children":[["$","$L6",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 6v6l4 2","key":"mmk7yg"}]],"className":"lucide-clock","size":13}]," ","6 min read"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"February 3, 2026"}]]}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-10 pb-16","children":[["$","article",null,{"className":"lg:col-span-2","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xl text-stone-600 leading-relaxed mb-6 font-medium pl-4 border-l-4 border-orange-500","children":"A chair mat protects your floor, makes rolling your chair effortless, and prevents the fatigue that comes from fighting your flooring all day. These are the best options for hardwood, carpet, and everything in between."}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xs text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400 mb-8 p-3 rounded-lg bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-900 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Affiliate disclosure:"}]," This post may contain affiliate links to products we recommend. We earn a small commission when you buy through them, at no extra cost to you. As an Amazon Associate we earn from qualifying purchases. See our ",["$","$L7",null,{"href":"/disclaimer","className":"text-orange-600 dark:text-orange-400 hover:underline","children":"disclaimer"}]," for details."]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"prose","children":[["$","h2","0",{"id":"why-a-chair-mat-matters","children":"Why a Chair Mat Matters"}],["$","p","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Rolling an office chair on carpet or hardwood without a mat creates two problems. On carpet: you fight the resistance with every movement, adding low-level physical effort to every repositioning. On hardwood: the chair casters scratch the floor and roll unpredictably."}}],"$L29","$L2a","$L2b","$L2c","$L2d","$L2e","$L2f","$L30","$L31","$L32","$L33","$L34","$L35","$L36","$L37","$L38","$L39","$L3a","$L3b","$L3c","$L3d","$L3e","$L3f","$L40","$L41"]}],"$L42","$L43","$L44"]}],"$L45"]}]]}]
46:I[94097,["/_next/static/chunks/0wjbooevnfpw4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js"],"default"]
47:I[24170,["/_next/static/chunks/0wjbooevnfpw4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js"],"default"]
48:I[55132,["/_next/static/chunks/0wjbooevnfpw4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js"],"default"]
:HL["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1506784983877-45594efa4cbe?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","image"]
:HL["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1511671782779-c97d3d27a1d4?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","image"]
29:["$","p","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A chair mat solves both: smooth, consistent rolling with zero resistance, floor protection, and — on carpet — a stable surface that prevents the chair from sinking and tilting."}}]
2a:["$","p","3",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The ergonomic benefit is real. Effortless chair movement encourages you to adjust your position throughout the day — which reduces the static muscle tension that causes back pain during long work sessions."}}]
2b:["$","h2","4",{"id":"hardwood-vs-carpet-different-requirements","children":"Hardwood vs. Carpet: Different Requirements"}]
2c:["$","p","5",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Hard floors</strong> (hardwood, tile, vinyl): Need a mat that stays in place without adhesive, provides a smooth surface for rolling, and protects the finish. Avoid mats with spikes on the underside — these are designed for carpet and will scratch hard floors."}}]
2d:["$","p","6",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Carpet</strong>: Need a mat with grippers on the underside to prevent sliding. The thicker the carpet pile, the more important this is. Check that the mat is rated for the carpet thickness."}}]
2e:["$","p","7",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Low-pile carpet</strong> (most office carpet): Standard chair mats work well."}}]
2f:["$","p","8",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>High-pile or plush carpet</strong>: Requires a thicker, heavier mat with deeper grippers to stay stable."}}]
30:["$","h2","9",{"id":"materials","children":"Materials"}]
31:["$","p","10",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Polycarbonate</strong>: The clearest, hardest, and most durable plastic option. Scratch-resistant, supports heavy chairs without deforming, and maintains clarity over years. The best material for most setups."}}]
32:["$","p","11",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>PVC</strong>: Less expensive than polycarbonate, less durable. Clouds over time, can crack in cold environments, and deforms under sustained heavy loads. Adequate for light use but not for all-day sitting."}}]
33:["$","p","12",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Glass</strong>: The premium option. Scratch-proof, completely transparent, and effectively permanent. Heavy and expensive but the best-looking option for visible home office setups."}}]
34:["$","p","13",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Bamboo/Cork</strong>: Sustainable materials that work well on hard floors. Look good but not suitable for carpet use."}}]
35:["$","h2","14",{"id":"size-guide","children":"Size Guide"}]
36:["$","p","15",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Standard chair mats are 90×120 cm — adequate for a fixed-position setup. For larger desks where you roll significantly, a 120×150 cm mat is better. Measure your rolling distance in all directions and add 30 cm."}}]
37:["$","h2","16",{"id":"best-chair-mats-in-2026","children":"Best Chair Mats in 2026"}]
38:["$","h3","17",{"id":"best-overall-gorilla-grip-polycarbonate-chair-mat-60","children":"Best Overall: Gorilla Grip Polycarbonate Chair Mat (~£60)"}]
39:["$","p","18",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Thick polycarbonate, clear, scratch-resistant, and available in multiple sizes for both hard floors and carpet. One of the few budget mats that does not deform under sustained load."}}]
3a:["$","h3","19",{"id":"best-for-hard-floors-lorell-polycarbonate-chair-mat-80","children":"Best for Hard Floors: Lorell Polycarbonate Chair Mat (~£80)"}]
3b:["$","p","20",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Bevelled edges prevent tripping, ultra-clear finish, and a surface that rolls more smoothly than most carpet mats. The correct choice if your floor finish matters."}}]
3c:["$","h3","21",{"id":"best-for-deep-carpet-amazonbasics-polycarbonate-office-chair-mat-55","children":"Best for Deep Carpet: AmazonBasics Polycarbonate Office Chair Mat (~£55)"}]
3d:["$","p","22",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Longer gripper studs specifically designed for high-pile carpet. Stays completely still under the chair without adhesive."}}]
3e:["$","h3","23",{"id":"best-premium-vitrazza-glass-office-chair-mat-250","children":"Best Premium: Vitrazza Glass Office Chair Mat (~£250)"}]
3f:["$","p","24",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Tempered glass, scratch-proof forever, and looks completely different from plastic alternatives. Heavy (14 kg for the standard size) and expensive but the most durable and visually clean option available."}}]
40:["$","h3","25",{"id":"best-budget-transparentno-chair-mat-30","children":"Best Budget: Transparentno Chair Mat (~£30)"}]
41:["$","p","26",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"PVC, basic, and adequate for light to medium use on hard floors. Not for heavy chairs or extended daily use, but sufficient as a starting point."}}]
42:["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-10 pt-8 border-t border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-sm font-medium text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400","children":"Topic:"}],["$","$L7",null,{"href":"/blog?category=Gear","className":"text-sm font-semibold px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-orange-50 text-orange-700 hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity","children":"Gear"}],[["$","$L7","chair-mat",{"href":"/blog/tag/chair-mat","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800
